merged_events.event_description: Diplomatic relations established with Kyrgyzstan following U.S. recognition of its independence upon dissolution of the Soviet Union, but no mission yet opened.

evidence.quote: Diplomatic relations were established on December 25, 1991, when President George H.W. Bush announced the decision in an address to the nation regarding the dissolution of the Soviet Union.

merged_events.event_description: The American Embassy in Bishkek was established with Edmund McWilliams as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

evidence.quote: The American Embassy in Bishkek was established on February 1, 1992, with Edmund McWilliams as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

matched.notes: Exact date and status match. Both record the establishment of the American Embassy in Bishkek on 1992-02-01.

missing_from_csv.event_description: Diplomatic relations established with Kyrgyzstan following U.S. recognition of its independence upon dissolution of the Soviet Union. No mission yet opened.
missing_from_csv.notes: High-confidence event from RDCR with verified citation. This represents the initial recognition/establishment of diplomatic relations on December 25, 1991, prior to the embassy opening on February 1, 1992. Candidate for addition as a 'None' status entry preceding the Embassy row.
